notes: Family-specific C2 checkin should retrieve STRRAT and C2 mapping guidance.
query: STRRAT CnC Checkin Malware Command and Control

notes: SMB exploit query should prefer MS17-010 and SMB protocol documents.
query: MS17-010 SMB exploit port 445 SMBv1 EternalBlue

notes: Beacon response should retrieve implant/backdoor guidance, not only exploit.
query: DOUBLEPULSAR Beacon Response implant backdoor post-exploitation

notes: Low-confidence anomaly query should retrieve false-positive boundaries.
query: ICMPv6 invalid checksum unknown code protocol anomaly

notes: Port breadth and failed connections should retrieve scan guidance.
query: many destination ports failed connections failed_conn_rate unique_dst_ports

notes: SYN-heavy scan query should retrieve TCP flags and scan documents.
query: TCP SYN scan tcp_syn_count tcp_ack_count Nmap reconnaissance

notes: SQLi query should retrieve web exploit and HTTP URI interpretation.
query: SQL injection union select HTTP URI web exploit

notes: XSS query should retrieve XSS and web exploit documents.
query: XSS script injection javascript onerror HTTP parameter

notes: Traversal query should retrieve path traversal and HTTP evidence guidance.
query: directory traversal ../ passwd path traversal LFI

notes: Command injection query should retrieve shell command exploit guidance.
query: command injection wget curl shell metacharacters

notes: DNS tunnel query should retrieve tunnel signature and false-positive boundary.
query: DNS tunnel long domain encoded subdomain TXT query

notes: Periodic TLS query should retrieve both C2 and false-positive boundary guidance.
query: periodic TLS SNI beacon HTTPS callback C2

notes: Bruteforce query should retrieve other_attack mapping and remote access protocol context.
query: SSH brute force login attempt repeated authentication failures

notes: High-volume query should retrieve both DDoS and high-volume false-positive guidance.
query: high volume traffic possible DDoS flood packet_count conn_count

notes: Normal SMB query should retrieve boundary rule that port 445 alone is not exploit.
query: normal SMB traffic port 445 without exploit alert file sharing
